"I mean, there's not really anyone to fight--"
"Wait. WHAT."

"What do you mean chatting? Like what we do in our free time? Uh... I just train, eat, and kick Uub's ass in literally every game."

"I like meditating and taking walks-- AND THAT IS NOT TRUE!--"

"I don't have free time."

"Also what's with these weird ass questions--"

"I tried, but eventually, I just got hit hard enough to where I didn't get up. Plus, they kind of stop working once you get as strong as me!"
